allow: Bash(rm -rf install.sh bootstrap.sh lib post stages)
Bash(mv go/main.go go/go.mod go/go.sum go/.goreleaser.yaml go/internal .)
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(i['path']\) for i in d.get\('items',[]\)]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(t['path']\) for t in d['tree'] if 'device_model' in t['path'] or t['path'].endswith\('lvm.py'\)]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; [print\(i['path']\) for i in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d.get\('disk_config',{}\), indent=1\)\); print\('BOOTLOADER:', json.dumps\(d.get\('bootloader_config'\) or d.get\('bootloader'\)\)\); print\('ENC TOP:', 'disk_encryption' in d\)")
